debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_starts_in_1 :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.startsIn1Condition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
⊢ u ≠ v

proof:
(by
        by_contra h_eq
        rw [h_eq] at dstep
        have h_in : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ v := by
          have := dstep.sound
          simp [this, Word.mem_mul_iff_or]
          tauto
        specialize h_exhaustive _ h_in
        simp at h_exhaustive)
failed_attempts:
(by
        intro h_eq
        have h_in : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ v := by
          rw [← h_eq, dstep.sound]
          simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]
        have h_contra := h_exhaustive _ h_in
        simp at h_contra
      )

(by
        intro h_eq
        have h_var : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by
          have h_sound := dstep.sound
          simp at h_sound
          simp [h_sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or]
          apply Or.inl; apply Or.inr; rfl
        rw [h_eq] at h_var
        have h_contra := h_exhaustive _ h_var
        simp at h_contra
        contradiction)
h_neq

(by
        intro h_eq
        rw [h_eq] at dstep
        have h_in : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ v := by
          rw [dstep.sound]
          simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]
          right; left; rfl
        have h_contra := h_exhaustive _ h_in
        simp at h_contra
        contradiction)

(by
        intro h_eq
        have h_in_u : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by
          simp [dstep.sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or]
          tauto
        rw [h_eq] at h_in_u
        have h_contra := h_exhaustive _ h_in_u
        simp at h_contra
        exact h_contra)

(by
        intro h_eq
        rw [exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive
        have h_u_has_var : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by
          have h_sound := dstep.sound
          simp at h_sound
          simp [h_sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or]
          tauto
        rw [h_eq] at h_u_has_var
        have h_contra := h_exhaustive _ h_u_has_var
        simp at h_contra
        contradiction)

(by
        intro h_eq
        subst h_eq
        have h_in_v : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ v := by
          rw [dstep.sound]
          simp
        have h_bad := h_exhaustive _ h_in_v
        simp at h_bad
        contradiction)

(by
        by_contra h_eq
        rw [← h_eq] at h_exhaustive
        have h_var : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by
          rw [dstep.sound]
          simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]
          tauto
        have h_contra := h_exhaustive _ h_var
        simp [Sum.isRight] at h_contra
        exact h_contra)

(by

        rw [h_eq] at h_var
        have h_contra := h_exhaustive _ h_var
        simp at h_contra

(by

h_neq
